title: 5-year player history (2021-2025) with trajectory detection
description: Per-player season lines (ESPN kona actuals, PPR) and a measured-or-estimated trajectory for the CURRENT projected 300. Produced by scripts/build_history.py, validated by scripts/validate_data.py. source 'measured' = OLS slope + age-curve residual over >=3 observed seasons; 'ai_estimated' = scripts/ai_estimates.py documented rules for <3 seasons; 'pending' = estimation module not yet available (nulls, honest gap).

updated_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last regeneration.

players.description: Map of projection key ('espn-<id>') -> history record.

seasons.description: Observed season lines, ascending by yr. A missing year means the player had no positive real total that season (or was outside the per-season pool) — never zero-filled.

pts.description: Real full-season PPR total (kona statSourceId 0, splitType 0).

receptions.description: Raw receptions, kona statId '53'. 0 for QBs.

targets.description: Raw targets, kona statId '58'. 0 for QBs.

games.description: Games played, kona statId '210'; omitted when absent or implausible.

slope_pts_per_yr.description: OLS slope of pts on season year (measured) or the documented estimate; null only while pending.

curve_residual_per_yr.description: Mean per-year delta between observed season-over-season pts ratio and the position age-curve expectation (scripts/signals/aging.py). Negative = declining faster than the curve; null only while pending.

source.description: 'measured' requires seasons_observed >= 3; 'pending' is the honest placeholder until scripts/ai_estimates.py lands.
